name: task_get_children
description: Get the immediate child tasks of a parent task. Returns only direct children (one level deep), not the full subtree. Use this to inspect the decomposition of a task into its sub-components. Results are paginated via limit and offset.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the parent task whose children to retrieve

limit.description: Maximum number of child tasks to return

offset.description: Number of child tasks to skip for pagination

examples.name: Get children of a parent task
